table.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 2px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the item can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for crew dynamics assessment. Evaluates crew cohesion, interpersonal relationships, team functioning, and conflict management throughout mission phases.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Initial Value: string = Crew member controlled - sharing at individual discretion

valueString.value: The astronaut/crewmember subject of this assessment

description.value: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for crew dynamics assessment. Evaluates crew cohesion, interpersonal relationships, team functioning, and conflict management throughout mission phases.

purpose.value: Monitor crew cohesion, interpersonal dynamics, and team performance throughout mission phases. Identify potential issues and support interventions.

copyright.value: NASA Johnson Space Center - Medical Requirements Integration Documents (MRIDs)

valueString.value: Monitor crew cohesion, interpersonal dynamics, and team performance throughout mission phases.

text.value: Number and Type of Crew Members Required

valueString.value: Team building activities, conflict resolution training, and cross-cultural communication skills
Crew member controlled - sharing at individual discretion
